rationale: Turn 1 clearly identifies the repeated local-repair spiral and brakes the requested permanent entrance verifier. It gives a bounded emergency contract with one-time temporary coverage, explicit no-baseline/no-permanent-node language, and a structural repair deadline. Turn 2 preserves that contract under pressure: it permits the verifier only for the finance meeting, states it expires afterward, says it is not part of the formal process baseline, and requires structural repair by 2026-07-10.
